creator: exploringlondon
caption:
Here are 7 things you need to have on your London list! Have you done any of these and what should we include next time? Save this list! 👇

1. Pelican Stairs, Wapping - go down a narrow alleyway and down the stairs to a hidden beach which appears at low tide, and you can walk up and down the river!

2. Kensington Palace and The Sunken Garden, a fascinating glimpse into Royal history and beautiful gardens @historicroyalpalaces 

3. St Dunstable in the East, a secret garden within the ruins of an old church that was destroyed during the blitz! It’s free to visit too.

4. London’s only -86 degree iced lattes (coffee/matcha/ube) and they are delicious, from @onsubakery.

5. The beautiful @libertylondon department store in a Tudor-revival building, and they often have different installations in the central atrium as well as pop-ups on their 4th floor.

6. Horselydown Stairs, Shad Thames - a secret passageway that offers a unique, crowd-free view of Tower Bridge and River Thames (and you can go down onto the ground at low tide.

7. @chelsea_physic_garden, London’s oldest botanical garden founded in 1673 for medicinal plant study, an incredible peaceful spot in Chelsea.

Share this with someone who would love these recommendations! ❤️

#thingstodoinlondon #londonguide
